---
title: "Photography"
toc: false
lightbox: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Placeholder** — Add your images to `assets/photography/` and replace the commented
template below with your gallery.
:::

<!--
Example 3-column lightbox gallery — uncomment and populate when images are ready.
Images link to full-size versions; clicking opens the lightbox overlay.

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![Caption](../../assets/photography/image01.jpg){group="gallery"}
![Caption](../../assets/photography/image02.jpg){group="gallery"}
![Caption](../../assets/photography/image03.jpg){group="gallery"}
![Caption](../../assets/photography/image04.jpg){group="gallery"}
![Caption](../../assets/photography/image05.jpg){group="gallery"}
![Caption](../../assets/photography/image06.jpg){group="gallery"}
:::
-->
